# orcasecurity_admission_controller_control (Resource)

Provides an Admission Controller control: one template instantiated with concrete parameters and a Kubernetes resource scope. Attach controls to an `orcasecurity_admission_controller_policy` to activate them.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_scope` (Attributes) Kubernetes resources the control applies to. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cluster_scope))
- `name` (String) Control name.
- `template_id` (String) ID of the control template to instantiate. Use the `orcasecurity_admission_controller_template` data source to look it up by name.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Control description.
- `input_parameters` (String) Template-specific parameters as a JSON object (use `jsonencode(...)`). The expected fields are defined by the template's schema (GET /api/admission_controller/templates/{id}, `content.spec.crd.spec.validation.openAPIV3Schema`). Omit for templates without parameters.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Control ID.
- `template_name` (String) Internal name of the template backing this control.

<a id="nestedatt--cluster_scope"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cluster_scope`

Required:

- `kinds` (Attributes List) List of kind selectors. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cluster_scope--kinds))

<a id="nestedatt--cluster_scope--kinds"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cluster_scope.kinds`

Required:

- `kinds` (List of String) Kubernetes kinds (e.g. `Pod`, `Deployment`). Must be within the template's `supported_kinds`.

Optional:

- `api_groups` (List of String) Kubernetes API groups. Use `[""]` for the core group (recommended; matches the Orca UI).
- `versions` (List of String) Kubernetes API versions. Use `[""]` for any version (recommended; matches the Orca UI).
